description: Used for both objects (old) and people (aged).

exampleSentences.english: My car is very old.
exampleSentences.hindi: मेरी कार बहुत पुरानी है।

exampleSentences.english: How old are you?
exampleSentences.hindi: तुम्हारी उम्र क्या है?

description: Refers to physical or mental effort that is draining.

exampleSentences.english: The job is very exhausting.
exampleSentences.hindi: काम बहुत थका देने वाला है।

exampleSentences.english: It was a strenuous day.
exampleSentences.hindi: यह एक थका देने वाला दिन था।

description: Used for lack of money or to express sympathy (e.g., 'poor soul').

exampleSentences.german: Er kommt aus einer armen Familie.
exampleSentences.english: He comes from a poor family.
exampleSentences.hindi: वह एक गरीब परिवार से आता है।

exampleSentences.english: You poor fellow!
exampleSentences.hindi: तुम बेचारे!

description: Refers to low price; can sometimes imply low quality.

exampleSentences.german: Das Brot ist hier sehr billig.
exampleSentences.english: The bread is very cheap here.
exampleSentences.hindi: यहाँ ब्रेड बहुत सस्ती है।

exampleSentences.english: I am looking for a cheap hotel.
exampleSentences.hindi: मैं एक सस्ते होटल की तलाश में हूँ।

description: Common color; colloquially also used to mean 'drunk'.

exampleSentences.german: Der Himmel ist heute sehr blau.
exampleSentences.english: The sky is very blue today.
exampleSentences.hindi: आज आसमान बहुत नीला है।

exampleSentences.english: She has blue eyes.
exampleSentences.hindi: उसकी आँखें नीली हैं।

description: Refers to a variety of colors or being multi-colored.

exampleSentences.german: Die Blumen im Garten sind sehr bunt.
exampleSentences.english: The flowers in the garden are very colorful.
exampleSentences.hindi: बगीचे के फूल बहुत रंग-बिरंगे हैं।

exampleSentences.english: Children like to paint colorful pictures.
exampleSentences.hindi: बच्चे रंगीन चित्र बनाना पसंद करते हैं।

description: Used for lack of light or for deep shades of colors.

exampleSentences.german: Im Winter wird es früh dunkel.
exampleSentences.english: In winter it gets dark early.
exampleSentences.hindi: सर्दियों में जल्दी अंधेरा हो जाता है।

exampleSentences.english: I like the dark blue shirt.
exampleSentences.hindi: मुझे गहरे नीले रंग की कमीज पसंद है।

description: The physical sensation of needing to drink.

exampleSentences.german: Nach dem Sport bin ich immer sehr durstig.
exampleSentences.english: After sports, I am always very thirsty.
exampleSentences.hindi: खेल के बाद मुझे हमेशा बहुत प्यास लगती है।

exampleSentences.german: Hast du Wasser? Das Kind ist durstig.
exampleSentences.english: Do you have water? The child is thirsty.
exampleSentences.hindi: क्या तुम्हारे पास पानी है? बच्चा प्यासा है।

description: Can mean 'not difficult' or 'not complicated'.

exampleSentences.english: German is not always easy.
exampleSentences.hindi: जर्मन हमेशा आसान नहीं होती।

exampleSentences.english: That is a simple solution.
exampleSentences.hindi: यह एक सरल समाधान है।

description: Used to describe refined style in clothing, behavior, or design. Note: Base form provided.

exampleSentences.english: She is wearing an elegant dress.
exampleSentences.hindi: उसने एक शानदार पोशाक पहनी है।

exampleSentences.german: Das Restaurant ist sehr elegant eingerichtet.
exampleSentences.english: The restaurant is very elegantly furnished.
exampleSentences.hindi: रेस्तरां को बहुत सुंदर तरीके से सजाया गया है।

description: Refers to liberty, available space, or being off from work.

exampleSentences.english: Is this seat still free?
exampleSentences.hindi: क्या यह सीट अभी खाली है?

exampleSentences.german: Am Wochenende habe ich endlich frei.
exampleSentences.english: I'm finally free on the weekend.
exampleSentences.hindi: सप्ताहांत में मैं आखिरकार खाली हूँ।

description: Used to express relief or joy about a specific situation. Note: 'frohes' is a declined form.

exampleSentences.german: Ich bin froh, dass du hier bist.
exampleSentences.english: I am glad that you are here.
exampleSentences.hindi: मुझे खुशी है कि तुम यहाँ हो।

exampleSentences.english: Merry Christmas!
exampleSentences.hindi: क्रिसमस की शुभकामनाएँ!

description: Standard color adjective.

exampleSentences.english: The lemon is yellow.
exampleSentences.hindi: नींबू पीला होता है।

exampleSentences.english: He is wearing a yellow t-shirt.
exampleSentences.hindi: उसने पीली टी-शर्ट पहनी है।

description: Refers to physical health or things that promote health.

exampleSentences.english: Fruit is very healthy.
exampleSentences.hindi: फल बहुत स्वास्थ्यवर्धक होते हैं।

exampleSentences.german: Ich hoffe, du wirst schnell wieder gesund.
exampleSentences.english: I hope you get healthy again soon.
exampleSentences.hindi: मुझे आशा है कि आप जल्द ही फिर से स्वस्थ हो जाएंगे।

description: Covers both emotional happiness and being lucky.

exampleSentences.english: She is a happy woman.
exampleSentences.hindi: वह एक खुशहाल महिला है।

exampleSentences.english: That was a lucky decision.
exampleSentences.hindi: वह एक भाग्यशाली निर्णय था।

description: Used for size, height of people, and abstract greatness.

exampleSentences.english: My brother is very tall.
exampleSentences.hindi: मेरा भाई बहुत लंबा है।

exampleSentences.english: Berlin is a big city.
exampleSentences.hindi: बर्लिन एक बड़ा शहर है।

description: Standard color; also used for nature or political parties.

exampleSentences.english: The grass is green.
exampleSentences.hindi: घास हरी है।

exampleSentences.english: I like to go into the countryside.
exampleSentences.hindi: मुझे हरियाली में जाना पसंद है।

description: Fundamental adjective for quality and well-being.

exampleSentences.english: The food tastes very good.
exampleSentences.hindi: खाना बहुत अच्छा है।

exampleSentences.english: I am doing well.
exampleSentences.hindi: मैं ठीक हूँ।

description: Refers to a good price or a favorable opportunity/moment.

exampleSentences.english: That is a favorable price.
exampleSentences.hindi: यह एक किफायती कीमत है।

exampleSentences.german: Der Moment ist gerade sehr günstig.
exampleSentences.english: The moment is very convenient right now.
exampleSentences.hindi: यह समय अभी बहुत अनुकूल है।

description: Related to religion or things considered extremely important.

exampleSentences.german: Die Kuh ist in Indien heilig.
exampleSentences.english: The cow is sacred in India.
exampleSentences.hindi: भारत में गाय पवित्र है।

exampleSentences.english: That is a holy place.
exampleSentences.hindi: यह एक पवित्र स्थान है।

description: Used for high temperatures of objects, weather, or spicy food.

exampleSentences.german: Der Tee ist noch sehr heiß.
exampleSentences.english: The tea is still very hot.
exampleSentences.hindi: चाय अभी बहुत गरम है।

exampleSentences.english: Today is a hot summer day.
exampleSentences.hindi: आज गर्मी का एक गरम दिन है।

description: Refers to the intensity of light or light shades of a color.

exampleSentences.english: It is already bright outside.
exampleSentences.hindi: बाहर पहले से ही उजाला है।

exampleSentences.german: Ich hätte gerne ein hellblaues Hemd.
exampleSentences.english: I would like a light blue shirt.
exampleSentences.hindi: मुझे एक हल्की नीली कमीज चाहिए।

description: Refers to elevation or distance from the ground. Note: the 'ch' changes to 'h' when declined (e.g., ein hoher Berg).

exampleSentences.german: Der Mount Everest ist sehr hoch.
exampleSentences.english: Mount Everest is very high.
exampleSentences.hindi: माउंट एवरेस्ट बहुत ऊँचा है।

exampleSentences.german: Die Miete in München ist hoch.
exampleSentences.english: The rent in Munich is high.
exampleSentences.hindi: म्यूनिख में किराया ऊँचा है।

description: The physical need for food.

exampleSentences.german: Ich bin so hungrig, ich könnte ein Pferd essen.
exampleSentences.english: I am so hungry I could eat a horse.
exampleSentences.hindi: मुझे इतनी भूख लगी है कि मैं एक घोड़ा खा सकता हूँ।

exampleSentences.german: Die hungrigen Kinder warten auf das Abendessen.
exampleSentences.english: The hungry children are waiting for dinner.
exampleSentences.hindi: भूखे बच्चे रात के खाने का इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं।

description: Used to describe appearance or an unpleasant situation.

exampleSentences.english: That is an ugly building.
exampleSentences.hindi: यह एक बदसूरत इमारत है।

exampleSentences.english: They had a nasty argument.
exampleSentences.hindi: उनका बहुत बुरा झगड़ा हुआ।

description: Used to describe attractive people, objects, or pleasant sights.

exampleSentences.english: That is a pretty dress.
exampleSentences.hindi: यह एक सुंदर पोशाक है।

exampleSentences.english: She has a pretty face.
exampleSentences.hindi: उसका चेहरा सुंदर है।

description: Refers to living beings or organizations that haven't existed long.

exampleSentences.english: He is still very young.
exampleSentences.hindi: वह अभी बहुत जवान है।

exampleSentences.english: Young people like to travel.
exampleSentences.hindi: युवा लोग यात्रा करना पसंद करते हैं।

description: Used for weather, temperature, and sometimes emotional detachment.

exampleSentences.german: Im Winter ist es sehr kalt.
exampleSentences.english: It is very cold in winter.
exampleSentences.hindi: सर्दियों में बहुत ठंड होती है।

exampleSentences.english: I am cold.
exampleSentences.hindi: मुझे ठंड लग रही है।

description: Refers to physical size or short stature in people.

exampleSentences.german: Die Wohnung ist klein, aber gemütlich.
exampleSentences.english: The apartment is small but cozy.
exampleSentences.hindi: अपार्टमेंट छोटा है लेकिन आरामदायक है।

exampleSentences.german: Das Kind ist noch zu klein.
exampleSentences.english: The child is still too small.
exampleSentences.hindi: बच्चा अभी बहुत छोटा है।

description: Refers to physical or mental ill health.

exampleSentences.german: Ich kann heute nicht kommen, ich bin krank.
exampleSentences.english: I can't come today, I am sick.
exampleSentences.hindi: मैं आज नहीं आ सकता, मैं बीमार हूँ।

exampleSentences.german: Er war lange Zeit schwer krank.
exampleSentences.english: He was seriously ill for a long time.
exampleSentences.hindi: वह लंबे समय तक गंभीर रूप से बीमार थे।

description: Refers to length or duration.

exampleSentences.english: The skirt is too short.
exampleSentences.hindi: स्कर्ट बहुत छोटी है।

exampleSentences.english: We are taking a short break.
exampleSentences.hindi: हम एक छोटा सा ब्रेक ले रहे हैं।

description: Used for distance, physical length, or periods of time.

exampleSentences.german: Der Weg zum Bahnhof ist lang.
exampleSentences.english: The way to the station is long.
exampleSentences.hindi: स्टेशन का रास्ता लंबा है।

exampleSentences.english: She has long hair.
exampleSentences.hindi: उसके बाल लंबे हैं।

description: Refers to low speed or a gradual process.

exampleSentences.english: Please speak slowly.
exampleSentences.hindi: कृपया धीरे बोलें।

exampleSentences.english: The turtle is very slow.
exampleSentences.hindi: कछुआ बहुत धीमा है।

description: Refers to volume or a noisy environment.

exampleSentences.english: The music is too loud.
exampleSentences.hindi: संगीत बहुत तेज़ है।

exampleSentences.english: Do you hear the loud bang?
exampleSentences.hindi: क्या तुम वो तेज़ धमाका सुन रहे हो?

description: Common word to describe food that tastes good.

exampleSentences.english: The dinner was very delicious.
exampleSentences.hindi: रात का खाना बहुत स्वादिष्ट था।

exampleSentences.german: Ich habe einen leckeren Kuchen gebacken.
exampleSentences.english: I baked a tasty cake.
exampleSentences.hindi: मैंने एक स्वादिष्ट केक बनाया।

description: Used for containers, rooms, or abstract things like promises that contain nothing.

exampleSentences.english: The bottle is empty.
exampleSentences.hindi: बोतल खाली है।

exampleSentences.german: Das Haus steht seit Jahren leer.
exampleSentences.english: The house has been empty for years.
exampleSentences.hindi: घर सालों से खाली पड़ा है।

description: Refers to both low weight and low level of difficulty.

exampleSentences.english: This task is very easy.
exampleSentences.hindi: यह कार्य बहुत आसान है।

exampleSentences.english: The suitcase is surprisingly light.
exampleSentences.hindi: सूटकेस आश्चर्यजनक रूप से हल्का है।

description: Refers to low volume or a quiet environment.

exampleSentences.german: Sei bitte leise, das Baby schläft.
exampleSentences.english: Please be quiet, the baby is sleeping.
exampleSentences.hindi: कृपया शांत रहें, बच्चा सो रहा है।

exampleSentences.german: Sie spricht mit einer leisen Stimme.
exampleSentences.english: She speaks with a soft voice.
exampleSentences.hindi: वह धीमी आवाज़ में बोलती है।

description: A color adjective that is traditionally undeclinable in casual speech, though inflected forms exist in formal writing.

exampleSentences.english: She is wearing a purple t-shirt.
exampleSentences.hindi: उसने बैंगनी टी-शर्ट पहनी है।

exampleSentences.english: Purple is my favorite color.
exampleSentences.hindi: बैंगनी मेरा पसंदीदा रंग है।

description: Refers to biological sex or characteristics associated with men.

exampleSentences.english: The first name is masculine.
exampleSentences.hindi: पहला नाम पुल्लिंग है।

exampleSentences.english: He has very masculine facial features.
exampleSentences.hindi: उसके चेहरे के नैन-नक्श बहुत मर्दाना हैं।

description: Refers to the physical or mental state of needing rest or sleep.

exampleSentences.german: Ich bin nach der Arbeit immer sehr müde.
exampleSentences.english: I am always very tired after work.
exampleSentences.hindi: मैं काम के बाद हमेशा बहुत थका होता हूँ।

exampleSentences.german: Das Kind ist müde und will schlafen.
exampleSentences.english: The child is tired and wants to sleep.
exampleSentences.hindi: बच्चा थका हुआ है और सोना चाहता है।

description: Used for things relating to nature, or as a very common adverbial confirmation.

exampleSentences.english: That is a natural product.
exampleSentences.hindi: यह एक प्राकृतिक उत्पाद है।

exampleSentences.english: Are you coming along? - Yes, of course!
exampleSentences.hindi: क्या तुम साथ आ रहे हो? - हाँ, बेशक!

description: Weather term used when visibility is low due to fog.

exampleSentences.german: Fahr vorsichtig, es ist heute sehr neblig.
exampleSentences.english: Drive carefully, it is very foggy today.
exampleSentences.hindi: सावधानी से गाड़ी चलाएं, आज बहुत कोहरा है।

exampleSentences.german: Der Morgen war grau und neblig.
exampleSentences.english: The morning was gray and misty.
exampleSentences.hindi: सुबह धूसर और धुंधली थी।

description: Used for attitudes, medical test results, or mathematical values.

exampleSentences.german: Er hat eine negative Einstellung zur Arbeit.
exampleSentences.english: He has a negative attitude toward work.
exampleSentences.hindi: काम के प्रति उसका रवैया नकारात्मक है।

exampleSentences.english: The Corona test was negative.
exampleSentences.hindi: कोरोना टेस्ट नेगेटिव था।

description: The state of being worried or anxious about something.

exampleSentences.german: Vor der Prüfung war ich sehr nervös.
exampleSentences.english: I was very nervous before the exam.
exampleSentences.hindi: परीक्षा से पहले मैं बहुत घबराया हुआ था।

exampleSentences.german: Warum bist du so nervös? Alles wird gut.
exampleSentences.english: Why are you so nervous? Everything will be fine.
exampleSentences.hindi: तुम इतने बेचैन क्यों हो? सब ठीक हो जाएगा।

description: Used for newly created objects, recent events, or fresh ideas.

exampleSentences.german: Ich habe ein neues Handy gekauft.
exampleSentences.english: I bought a new mobile phone.
exampleSentences.hindi: मैंने एक नया मोबाइल खरीदा है।

exampleSentences.english: All the best in the new year!
exampleSentences.hindi: नए साल की ढेर सारी शुभकामनाएँ!

description: Refers to low height, temperature, or levels (like prices or water).

exampleSentences.english: The table is very low.
exampleSentences.hindi: मेज़ बहुत नीची है।

exampleSentences.german: Die Zinsen sind zurzeit sehr niedrig.
exampleSentences.english: The interest rates are very low at the moment.
exampleSentences.hindi: ब्याज दरें फिलहाल बहुत कम हैं।

description: Describes something that is indispensable or required to achieve a goal.

exampleSentences.german: Vitamine sind notwendig für die Gesundheit.
exampleSentences.english: Vitamins are necessary for health.
exampleSentences.hindi: स्वास्थ्य के लिए विटामिन आवश्यक हैं।

exampleSentences.german: Es ist notwendig, dass wir jetzt gehen.
exampleSentences.english: It is necessary that we leave now.
exampleSentences.hindi: यह ज़रूरी है कि हम अभी निकलें।

description: Having a lot of money, or being abundant in something (like resources).

exampleSentences.german: Er ist ein sehr reicher Mann.
exampleSentences.english: He is a very rich man.
exampleSentences.hindi: वह बहुत अमीर आदमी है।

exampleSentences.german: Das Land ist reich an Bodenschätzen.
exampleSentences.english: The country is rich in natural resources.
exampleSentences.hindi: देश प्राकृतिक संसाधनों से समृद्ध है।

description: Basic color adjective.

exampleSentences.english: The traffic light is red.
exampleSentences.hindi: ट्रैफिक लाइट लाल है।

exampleSentences.english: She has red cheeks.
exampleSentences.hindi: उसके गाल लाल हैं।

description: Refers to a low level of noise or a state of inner tranquility.

exampleSentences.german: Es ist heute sehr ruhig im Büro.
exampleSentences.english: It is very quiet in the office today.
exampleSentences.hindi: आज ऑफिस में बहुत शांति है।

exampleSentences.german: Bleib ganz ruhig, alles ist okay.
exampleSentences.english: Stay very calm, everything is okay.
exampleSentences.hindi: बिल्कुल शांत रहो, सब ठीक है।

description: The feeling of being full after eating; colloquially 'etwas satt haben' means to be fed up.

exampleSentences.german: Nein danke, ich bin schon satt.
exampleSentences.english: No thank you, I am already full.
exampleSentences.hindi: जी नहीं धन्यवाद, मेरा पेट भर गया है।

exampleSentences.german: Bist du sicher, dass du satt bist?
exampleSentences.english: Are you sure that you are full?
exampleSentences.hindi: क्या तुम पक्का तृप्त हो?

description: Used for hygiene or general tidiness of objects and places.

exampleSentences.german: Das Zimmer ist jetzt endlich sauber.
exampleSentences.english: The room is finally clean now.
exampleSentences.hindi: कमरा अब आखिरकार साफ है।

exampleSentences.english: Do you have clean hands?
exampleSentences.hindi: क्या तुम्हारे हाथ साफ हैं?

description: Opposite of 'gut'; used for quality, behavior, or feeling ill.

exampleSentences.german: Das Wetter ist heute wirklich schlecht.
exampleSentences.english: The weather is really bad today.
exampleSentences.hindi: आज मौसम वाकई खराब है।

exampleSentences.english: I feel sick/unwell.
exampleSentences.hindi: मेरी तबीयत खराब लग रही है।

description: Refers to physical dirt or soil on something.

exampleSentences.english: Your shoes are completely dirty.
exampleSentences.hindi: तुम्हारे जूते बिल्कुल गंदे हैं।

exampleSentences.german: Wirf das schmutzige Hemd in die Wäsche.
exampleSentences.english: Throw the dirty shirt into the laundry.
exampleSentences.hindi: गंदी कमीज को धोने के लिए डाल दो।

description: Refers to high speed or performing an action in a short time.

exampleSentences.english: The car drives very fast.
exampleSentences.hindi: कार बहुत तेज़ चलती है।

exampleSentences.german: Wir müssen schnell nach Hause gehen.
exampleSentences.english: We must go home quickly.
exampleSentences.hindi: हमें जल्दी घर जाना चाहिए।

description: Refers to a lack of physical strength, influence, or intensity.

exampleSentences.german: Nach der Krankheit fühlte er sich sehr schwach.
exampleSentences.english: After the illness, he felt very weak.
exampleSentences.hindi: बीमारी के बाद वह बहुत कमज़ोर महसूस कर रहा था।

exampleSentences.german: Das Licht in der Küche ist zu schwach.
exampleSentences.english: The light in the kitchen is too faint.
exampleSentences.hindi: रसोई की रोशनी बहुत कम है।

description: Standard color adjective for black; also used for 'dark' in certain contexts.

exampleSentences.english: He is wearing a black suit.
exampleSentences.hindi: उसने काला सूट पहना है।

exampleSentences.german: Die Nacht war schwarz und ohne Sterne.
exampleSentences.english: The night was black and without stars.
exampleSentences.hindi: रात काली और बिना सितारों वाली थी।

description: Used for both physical weight and the difficulty level of a task.

exampleSentences.german: Diese Kiste ist viel zu schwer.
exampleSentences.english: This box is way too heavy.
exampleSentences.hindi: यह बक्सा बहुत ज़्यादा भारी है।

exampleSentences.german: Deutsch zu lernen ist am Anfang schwer.
exampleSentences.english: Learning German is difficult at the beginning.
exampleSentences.hindi: शुरुआत में जर्मन सीखना कठिन होता है।

description: Universal adjective for aesthetic beauty or pleasant experiences.

exampleSentences.german: Wir haben heute einen schönen Tag.
exampleSentences.english: We are having a nice day today.
exampleSentences.hindi: आज हमारा दिन अच्छा है।

exampleSentences.english: You have really beautiful eyes.
exampleSentences.hindi: तुम्हारी आँखें सचमुच बहुत सुंदर हैं।

description: Refers to time occurring after the expected or usual moment.

exampleSentences.english: It is already very late.
exampleSentences.hindi: अब बहुत देर हो चुकी है।

exampleSentences.english: Why are you coming so late?
exampleSentences.hindi: तुम इतनी देर से क्यों आ रहे हो?

description: Used for physical strength, powerful influence, or high intensity (like rain or wind).

exampleSentences.english: He is a strong man.
exampleSentences.hindi: वह एक मज़बूत आदमी है।

exampleSentences.english: It is raining very heavily today.
exampleSentences.hindi: आज बहुत तेज़ बारिश हो रही है।

description: A very common colloquial adjective used to express high approval.

exampleSentences.english: That was a great party!
exampleSentences.hindi: वह एक शानदार पार्टी थी!

exampleSentences.english: Your idea is really awesome.
exampleSentences.hindi: तुम्हारा विचार वाकई बहुत बढ़िया है।

description: Refers to the taste of sugar or the appearance of something charming.

exampleSentences.english: The cake tastes very sweet.
exampleSentences.hindi: केक बहुत मीठा है।

exampleSentences.english: The baby is so cute!
exampleSentences.hindi: बच्चा बहुत प्यारा है!

description: Used when something costs a lot of money.

exampleSentences.german: Das Auto ist mir zu teuer.
exampleSentences.english: The car is too expensive for me.
exampleSentences.hindi: कार मेरे लिए बहुत महंगी है।

exampleSentences.english: Munich is an expensive city.
exampleSentences.hindi: म्यूनिख एक महंगा शहर है।

description: Refers to the emotional state of sadness or something that causes sorrow.

exampleSentences.english: Why are you so sad?
exampleSentences.hindi: तुम इतने उदास क्यों हो?

exampleSentences.english: That was a sad movie.
exampleSentences.hindi: वह एक दुखद फिल्म थी।

description: Used for statements, descriptions, or shapes that lack precision or clarity.

exampleSentences.english: His answer was very vague.
exampleSentences.hindi: उसका जवाब बहुत अस्पष्ट था।

exampleSentences.german: Ich habe nur eine vage Erinnerung daran.
exampleSentences.english: I only have a vague memory of it.
exampleSentences.hindi: मुझे इसकी बस धुंधली सी याद है।

description: Indicates a large quantity. Note: 'vielen' is the dative plural or accusative masculine form.

exampleSentences.english: I have a lot of work.
exampleSentences.hindi: मेरे पास बहुत काम है।

exampleSentences.english: Many thanks for your help!
exampleSentences.hindi: आपकी मदद के लिए बहुत-बहुत धन्यवाद!

description: Refers to a container reaching capacity or a place filled with people.

exampleSentences.english: The glass is half full.
exampleSentences.hindi: ग्लास आधा भरा हुआ है।

exampleSentences.german: Der Bus war heute Morgen sehr voll.
exampleSentences.english: The bus was very full this morning.
exampleSentences.hindi: आज सुबह बस बहुत भरी हुई थी।

description: The state of not being asleep or being mentally alert.

exampleSentences.english: Are you already awake?
exampleSentences.hindi: क्या तुम पहले से ही जागे हुए हो?

exampleSentences.german: Ich bin die ganze Nacht wach geblieben.
exampleSentences.english: I stayed awake all night.
exampleSentences.hindi: मैं पूरी रात जागा रहा।

description: Used for pleasant temperatures, between cold and hot.

exampleSentences.english: The water is pleasantly warm.
exampleSentences.hindi: पानी सुखद रूप से गरम है।

exampleSentences.english: Dress warmly!
exampleSentences.hindi: गरम कपड़े पहनो!

description: Standard color adjective; also used for 'blank' in some contexts.

exampleSentences.english: The sheet of paper is white.
exampleSentences.hindi: कागज का पन्ना सफेद है।

exampleSentences.english: She has a white car.
exampleSentences.hindi: उसके पास एक सफेद कार है।

description: Used to emphasize truth or reality; functions frequently as an adverb.

exampleSentences.english: Is that your real name?
exampleSentences.hindi: क्या यह तुम्हारा असली नाम है?

exampleSentences.german: Das ist wirklich eine gute Idee.
exampleSentences.english: That is really a good idea.
exampleSentences.hindi: यह वाकई एक अच्छा विचार है।

description: Relates to the middle of a place or the most important part of a topic.

exampleSentences.english: The hotel is located very centrally.
exampleSentences.hindi: होटल बहुत केंद्र में स्थित है।

exampleSentences.english: This is a central theme.
exampleSentences.hindi: यह एक मुख्य विषय है।
